title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 508.250 - Jurisdiction of court in cases removed
text:
508.250.  Jurisdiction of court in cases removed. — The court to which any cause shall be transferred by change of venue shall have jurisdiction to hear and determine the same, and shall proceed to final judgment and execution therein; although such cause would not otherwise be cognizable in such court.
(RSMo 1939 § 1071) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 920; 1919 § 1370; 1909 § 1940
